name: ruby-google-cloud-env
title: ruby-google-cloud-env
summary: Google Cloud Platform hosting environment information
description:
Google Cloud Platform hosting environment information
This library provides information on the application hosting environment for
apps running on Google Cloud Platform.
.
This library is supported on Ruby 2.3+.
Google provides official support for Ruby versions that are actively supported
by Ruby Core—that is, Ruby versions that are either in normal maintenance or
in security maintenance, and not end of life.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-google-cloud-env because Google Cloud Platform hosting environment information.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-google-cloud-env as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-google-cloud-env with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-google-cloud-env --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
